figures.caption: Figure 1: TR-ICRL combines both Test-Time Scaling (TTS) and In-Context Reinforcement Learning (ICRL).
Figure 6: Comparison of label accuracy and reward accuracy on AIME2024 and AIME2025. Even with low label accuracy, reward accuracy remains high due to “lucky reward”.
Figure 2: We evaluate TR-ICRL across a range of 1 to 10 ICRL steps within both reasoning and knowledgeintensive tasks. Performance at step 0 serves as the experimental baseline.
